name: io.github.Abhishekkumar2021/git
title: Git
description: Local Git via MCP: status, log, diff, file history, branches, and gated stage/commit. Pure-JS.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_ROOTS
environmentVariables.description: Allowed repo root directories (comma-separated). Required — the server refuses to start without it.

environmentVariables.name: GIT_WRITABLE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 or true to enable local write tools (stage/commit/branch/checkout).
